text:
Guilty Hero is the 5th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 5th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

The track has one remix, The Successor.

All occurrences

Episode 74 - Zeke reports his parents
Episode 81 - The Eldians in the internment camp
Special 2 and Episode 92 - Armin's breakdown

Navigation
